description: Pedestal/tulip-table layout inspired by Eero Saarinen's iconic furniture. A central hub radiates outward with orbital navigation rings, tapered panel borders that thin toward the bottom, and atomic-age starburst decorative elements as section dividers.

layout.navigationDescription: Concentric orbital rings around a central hub logo. Inner ring holds 5 primary views, outer ring holds 5 secondary views. Items orbit and scale on hover/active.

motion.viewTransition: scale(0.94) rotate(2deg) exit, scale(0.92) rotate(-2deg) enter, 500ms cubic-bezier
motion.orbitalFloat: translateY oscillation on stat pedestals, 4s ease-in-out infinite with staggered delays
motion.cardEntrance: scale(0.8) rotate(-5deg) to scale(1) rotate(0), staggered 80ms per card
motion.toggleBounce: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) spring effect on nav items and controls
motion.progressFill: width animation 800ms with spring easing, triggered by IntersectionObserver

views.label: Dashboard
views.description: Central hub with floating stat pedestals in orbit ring, sunburst activity chart, and activity timeline with pulsing orbital dots

views.label: Projects
views.description: Project cards in showcase grid with tulip stem borders, orbital entrance animations, and tapered clip-path stat pedestals

views.label: Project Workspace
views.description: Split workspace with tapered panel borders using border-image gradients, atomic starburst breadcrumbs, task checklist, and notes area

views.label: Kanban
views.description: Four lanes styled as tulip pedestals with plate-top headers, stem connectors, and card trays. Draggable card interaction

views.label: Whiteboard
views.description: Canvas with starburst radial-gradient grid markers, atomic-age node shapes (diamond, ellipse, atom-ring, starburst clip-path), draggable nodes

views.label: Schema Planner
views.description: Entity blocks as architectural pedestals with typed fields, primary/foreign key highlighting, and SVG dashed connection lines

views.label: Directory Tree
views.description: File tree with starburst expand/collapse icons that rotate on toggle, orbital connector dots for files, animated max-height expand

views.label: Ideas
views.description: Central capture input hub with pill-shaped ring container, idea cards in orbital field with dashed circular background decoration

views.label: AI Chat
views.description: Tulip-shaped message containers with rounded bubble tops and gradient stems. Live chat simulation with AI responses

views.label: Settings
views.description: Mid-century toggle switches with spring-animated thumbs, starburst section dividers, range sliders, text inputs, danger zone

files.name: index.html
files.description: Complete HTML document with all 10 views using data-page/data-view attributes, semantic structure, Google Fonts preconnect

files.name: style.css
files.description: Full CSS with custom properties, orbital nav styles, pedestal layouts, starburst animations, tapered borders, responsive breakpoints, reduced-motion support

files.name: app.js
files.description: IIFE-wrapped vanilla JS with hash routing, orbital view transitions, tree toggles, whiteboard drag, chat simulation, idea capture, keyboard nav, IntersectionObserver optimizations

files.name: README.md
files.description: Concept documentation covering design philosophy, palette, typography, all 10 views, technical details, and differentiation from Pass 1

files.name: validation/handoff.json
files.description: This file - structured metadata about the pass including all configuration values

files.name: validation/inspiration-crossreference.json
files.description: Design inspiration sources with specific elements adapted and differentiators explaining uniqueness

differentiationFromPass1.navigation: Orbital rings replacing horizontal credenza shelf
differentiationFromPass1.layout: Hub-and-spoke radial flow replacing 2-column card grid
differentiationFromPass1.decorative: Starburst/atomic CSS dividers replacing wood-grain textures
differentiationFromPass1.motion: Rotational scale+rotate transitions replacing linear fades
differentiationFromPass1.hero: Central pedestal hub element replacing top banner
